zh.lifeSummary: Mrs. Ulfchill De Swinburne於1136年出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾布拉德利 普蘭。她於大約1159年與Ulfchill De Swinburne在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世在她的家鄉。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Swinburne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Durham): habitational name primarily from Great and Little Swinburne (Northumberland), but perhaps also occasionally from one or other places similarly named, from Old English swīn ‘pig’ + burna ‘stream’.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs. Ulfchill De Swinburne was born in 1136, in Bradley Plain, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Ulfchill De Swinburne about 1159, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs. Ulfchill De Swinburne est née en 1136, à Bradley Plain, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Ulfchill De Swinburne environ 1159, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée dans sa ville natale.

ja.Bradley Plain, Hampshire, England, Unite: イギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアブラドリー プレイン

ja.lifeSummary: Mrs. Ulfchill De Swinburneは1136年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアブラドリー プレインで生まれた。約1159年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドでUlfchill De Swinburneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. Ulfchill De Swinburne(은)는 1136년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 브래들리 플린에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1159년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 Ulfchill De Swinburne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs. Ulfchill De Swinburne родилась в 1136 г. в местности брадли плеин, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ulfchill De Swinburne около 1159 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в её родном городе.
